_comment: CI-calibrated baselines for the GitHub Actions ubuntu-latest runner. Captured 2026-05-13 across 3 post-Phase-3 bench runs (PRs #50/#51 + tip). Numbers were ~3x the Apple Silicon dev-box numbers we previously used (22 µs tick, 970k msgs/s), so the gate was either flapping or kept informational via continue-on-error. Re-baseline by averaging at least 3 successful CI bench medians whenever the bench bodies in `crates/world/benches/world_bench.rs` materially change.
